steps.title: Identify the constraint that creates the need
steps.content: The decisive signal is “rendering parts of the complex physically inaccessible to researchers.” This constraint in the second sentence explains why the researchers needed an alternative method.

steps.title: Apply the causal relationship
steps.content: A causal transition word is needed. Hence (therefore) expresses that because areas were physically inaccessible, LiDAR was the only viable method. The others create a false parallel, imply time sequence, or narrow a point—missing the causal relationship entirely. That matches choice C — C is correct.
